name: BFF Math Class
author: Poki
description: BFF Math Class is a cute and stylish dress up game where you need to get ready to spend a day at school with your friends. Wash your face, put on some make-up, get dressed and pack your bag, because class is starting right now! Don’t forget to pay attention, because there is a tricky math quiz waiting for you. Do you know how to solve in style? How to play BFF Math Class? Click, tap or drag on the screen to interact. Who created BFF Math Class? BFF Math Class is created by Go Panda Games. Play their other games on Poki: Funny Angie Haircut , Tictoc Paris Fashion , Doc Darling Bone Surgery , Yummy Donut Factory , Yummy Chocolate Factory , Funny Kitty Haircut , TicToc Summer Fashion , Tictoc KPOP Fashion , Funny Puppy Emergency , Yummy Taco , Funny Cooking Camp , Funny Camping Day , Funny Travelling Airport , Funny Throat Surgery 2 , Yummy Waffle Ice Cream , Cooking Korean Lesson , Funny Pet Haircut , funny-puppy-dressup, funny-kitty-dressup, Funny Nose Surgery , and Doc HoneyBerry Puppy Surgery ! How can I play BFF Math Class for free? You can play BFF Math Class for free on Poki. Can I play BFF Math Class on mobile devices and desktop? BFF Math Class can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
